title: Check if Number is Armstrong Number
description:
An Armstrong number (also known as narcissistic number) is a number that is equal to the sum of its own digits each raised to the power of the number of digits.

For example: 153 = 1³ + 5³ + 3³ = 1 + 125 + 27 = 153
hints: Convert the number to a string to easily access each digit.
Sum each digit raised to the power of the digit count.
